testcase.name: routingStore > registers nodes and routes an edge between them
routingStore > nudges parallel edges apart
testcase.system-err: Warning: skipping checkpoint for connector 3 at (110, 125). Warning: skipping checkpoint for connector 3 at (290, 25).

testcase.name: routingStore > unregisters an edge and stops returning its points
testcase.system-err: Warning: skipping checkpoint for connector 8 at (110, 25). Warning: skipping checkpoint for connector 8 at (190, 225). Warning: skipping checkpoint for connector 3 at (110, 125). Warning: skipping checkpoint for connector 3 at (290, 25).

testcase.name: layoutFlowGraph > returns positions for nodes and preserves signature
layoutFlowGraph > keeps nodes and edges ids and data
layoutFlowGraph > handles a simple group with a child service node
calculateEdgeOffset > returns 0 for a single edge
calculateEdgeOffset > spreads multiple edges and sorts them by target position
calculateEdgeOffset > correctly calculates offsets for nodes in groups vs orphans using absolute coordinates
calculateEdgeOffset > correctly calculates absolute coordinates for deeply nested nodes
servicesGraph > correctly loads bidirectional connections between two services in the same group
testcase.system-out: Creating edge from svc::g1::svc-a to svc::g1::svc-b of type TCP (internal) Creating edge from svc::g1::svc-b to svc::g1::svc-a of type TCP (internal)

testcase.name: servicesGraph > correctly loads bidirectional connections involving an external service
testcase.system-out: Creating edge from svc::g1::svc-a to svc::g2::svc-ext of type TCP (external) Creating edge from svc::g2::svc-ext to svc::g1::svc-a of type TCP (external)
